aronui.when_to_use: Use this tool when you need to add a new pending task to the working memory. It is an alias for update_working_memory, where the actual correct usage is update_working_memory(add_task='<text>'). This fallback exists for compatibility.
aronui.output_shape: Returns a string confirming the task was added, e.g., 'Task added: <text>'.

procedure: Provide either the 'task' or 'text' argument with the desired task description as a string.
Call the tool with add_task if using the update_working_memory alias; else directly use add_task with one of the arguments.
verification: Check that the returned message confirms the addition of the task.
Verify that the task appears in the pending tasks list of working memory.
